_comment: LLM + translation configuration for scripts/translate-batch.py. Set 'provider' to anthropic | openai | gemini | copilot and the script reads the matching block under 'providers'. The 'copilot' provider routes through the GitHub Models inference API and uses your GitHub Copilot subscription tokens (auth via GITHUB_TOKEN env var, e.g. from `gh auth token`). CLI flags (--provider, --model, --locale, --file, --force, --dry-run) override these defaults.

copilot._comment: GitHub Models inference API. Auth via GITHUB_TOKEN env var (use `gh auth token` from a Copilot-enabled account). Model names use the github-models slug (provider/model). Counts against Copilot rate limits, not paid API credits.
